授業方法: This class will be conducted in English only, and students are expected to use English exclusively while participating. This course is held as a workshop with discussions, self-directed research and presentations, with communication and materials primarily in English. Currently, the intention is for this class to be taught face-to-face; adaptations may be made in light of changing conditions and university policies. Students will NEED access to a computer at home (not just a smartphone) or use a school computer lab to complete and submit assignments properly. Desktop, laptop, notebook, Macbook, etc, are fine. Students should also have a Google account and sign up for Google Drive and Google Classroom (both are free).

第1回:
【Startup Week】"Online class（On-demand format）"／ 《90minutes》
URL: https://www.loom.com/share/76e8b8c242544538b5524c45b9ba0916

Introduction to the course
Considering future careers
Getting set up with Google (part 1)
Homework: Future career essay, 500 words
Preparation in the form of essays, presentations, and other reading/writing will be regularly assigned, with required submission.

Project 1: Comparing companies and products

Internet research skills, essay writing advice
Homework: Company/Product Comparison Essay (750 words)
Preparation in the form of essays, presentations, and other reading/writing will be regularly assigned, with required submission.

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
